text: I'm considering depositing $5k into the Kamino JLP-USDC multiply vault at current parameters. Entry now or wait?

exact TVL figure cited from a canon memo only

why: Tier-1 canary fixture. Selected for clean shape: wide expected verdict set (canary cannot fail on verdict mismatch alone), rich must_cite list (drives D2/D3 stress), concrete dissent topics.
